text: Standing here, on the edge of a glass-walled room and an exhibition that invites research and development, I feel the tension between sterility and creativity. The empty conference room behind glass feels distant and clinical, as if waiting for ideas to arrive; while the vibrant exhibit ahead teems with color, words, and the presence of thought, beckoning me to consider uncertainty, possibility, and progress. I feel thoughtful and on the threshold of insight, caught between anticipation and curiosity.
